calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-27-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patricia VanSteenberge.
Petitioner: Luxanne C. Aquino, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Phoenix Aquino-Hubbard, was sworn and examined.
A copy from the original Death Certificate issued on 6-14-02 by Indiana State Dept. of Health, rec'd in court and attached to the Petition in file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Phoenix Aquino-Thomas.
Decree signed in open court.
